overall.description: Third-person game engine footage of a character walking through a lush, rocky valley with dense vegetation. The character traverses tall grass and rocky terrain between cliff walls in a tropical or subtropical natural environment with atmospheric haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy canyon floor between high rock walls

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily through tall grass in a narrow rocky valley

entered.detail: tall rocky cliff face covered in green vegetation
steep rock formation with patches of plants
dense tall green grass covering the canyon floor
large rock formation visible at the end of the valley

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow canyon with steep rock walls on both sides. The ground is covered in dense tall grass, and a large rock arch is visible in the hazy distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition area with mixed grass and rocky ground

events.description: ground surface transitions from dense grass to mixed dirt and scattered rocks

agents.ego_description: character continues walking as terrain becomes rockier and more open

entered.detail: large rocks scattered across the path ahead
massive boulder formation at the end of the valley

segments.scene_description: The valley opens up slightly as the character moves forward. The ground transitions from grass to a dirt trail with scattered rocks, and a large rock formation becomes prominent in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky path leading to large boulder formation

events.description: approaching the large rock formation at the end of the valley

agents.ego_description: character walking over rocky terrain toward the large boulders ahead

entered.detail: trees and bushes on the right side of the rocky path

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the end of the valley where the path becomes covered in gravel and stones. The large rock formation that was distant is now close ahead, with scattered trees visible on the right side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow, hazy canyon that gradually opens into a wider, rocky valley. It begins with the character walking between steep rock walls through dense tall grass, moving toward a distant rock arch shrouded in haze. As the character advances, the valley expands and the terrain transitions from lush grass to a dirt trail scattered with stones. The scene then shifts as the path becomes covered in gravel, bringing the previously distant rock formation into close view while scattered trees emerge on the right.
